prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约5111名、5063名、5457名、5055名、5139名，整体呈窄幅波动，近5年均值约5165名，2025年基准位次约5139名，位次走势基本稳定，无明显单边升降趋势；该校在北京市综合类招生计划：2021年135人、2022年153人、2023年153人、2024年151人、2025年161人；2026年计划160人，较2025年减少1人，属微幅缩招，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国农业大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第30名→2022年第29名→2023年第30名→2024年第27名→2025年第25名→2026年第24名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和影响力不断增强；2024年高考周期内该校声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要因考生反映招生沟通不畅、专业设置不合理导致投档线暴跌约500名；但2025年位次已恢复至5139名，负面舆情已消化。2026年声誉评价未收录该校，未见新负面信号。抖音热度总排名第13（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；第五轮学科评估中，该校A-及以上学科共7个：作物学A+、兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、草学A+、食品科学与工程A+、植物保护A、生物学A，农林学科实力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024年专业热度显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业高热推荐；法学、金融/财经/经济呈分化观望。该校招生专业以农林、生命科学、食品、环境等为主，相关学科社会热度平稳。北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅增加，整体竞争加剧。省控线数据：北京本科批2021年400分→2022年425分→2023年448分→2024年434分→2025年430分，近年略有波动但整体稳定；中国农业大学位于北京市，为本省高校，对本市考生有天然的地域偏好优势。该校在北京市招生人数占全国总招生计划的比例较高（2025年约161人），本地考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5139名、2026年计划微幅缩招（-1人）、北京市考生总数大幅增长约29.7%导致竞争加剧、软科排名持续上升增强学校吸引力、2024年负面舆情已消化等因素，判断2026年最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约5170名，波动区间4670–5670名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约5170名，区间4670–5670名。建议位次在区间中上段（约4670–5000名）的考生以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺；位次在区间中段（约5000–5400名）的考生以二档为主、三档保底；位次在区间下段（约5400–5670名）的考生以三档为主、争取二档。一档王牌专业（理科试验班、计算机类）竞争激烈，需位次明显优于预测值才有较大把握。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 5111, 5063, 5457, 5055, and 5139, showing narrow fluctuations overall. The average over the past five years is about 5165, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 5139. The ranking trend is basically stable, with no obvious one-sided upward or downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing: 135 in 2021, 153 in 2022, 153 in 2023, 151 in 2024, and 161 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 160, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, which is a slight reduction and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China Agricultural University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 30th in 2021 → 29th in 2022 → 30th in 2023 → 27th in 2024 → 25th in 2025 → 24th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and influence. During the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, the university's reputation evaluation was 'clearly negative,' mainly due to candidates reporting poor admissions communication and unreasonable major settings, leading to a sharp drop in admission scores by about 500 places. However, by 2025, the ranking had recovered to 5139, and the negative public opinion has been absorbed. The 2026 reputation evaluation did not include this university, and no new negative signals were observed. The overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 13th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable attention from applicants. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Crop Science A+, Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Grass Science A+, Food Science and Engineering A+, Plant Protection A, and Biology A. Its agricultural and forestry disciplines are top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, major popularity shows that engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended; Law, Finance/Economics are showing divergence and wait-and-see attitudes. The university's enrollment majors are mainly in agriculture, forestry, life sciences, food, and environment, with stable social popularity in related disciplines. The total number of college entrance exam registrants in Beijing for 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly increasing overall competition. Provincial control line data: Beijing undergraduate batch 2021 400 points → 2022 425 points → 2023 448 points → 2024 434 points → 2025 430 points, with slight fluctuations in recent years but overall stable. China Agricultural University is located in Beijing, a local university, giving it a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates. The university's enrollment in Beijing accounts for a relatively high proportion of the national total enrollment plan (about 161 in 2025), and local candidates have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5139, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (-1 person), the significant increase of about 29.7% in the total number of candidates in Beijing leading to intensified competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's attractiveness, and the digestion of negative public opinion from 2024, it is judged that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly shift backward from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5170, with a fluctuation range of 4670–5670.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5170, range 4670–5670. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (about 4670–5000) focus on Tier 2 majors with a sprint for Tier 1; candidates with rankings in the middle part (about 5000–5400) focus on Tier 2 with Tier 3 as a safety; candidates with rankings in the lower part (about 5400–5670) focus on Tier 3 and strive for Tier 2. Tier 1 flagship majors (Science Experimental Class, Computer Science) are highly competitive and require a ranking significantly better than the predicted value for a good chance.
